23: # Pydantic models for type Chat Message validation
24: class Context(PydanticBaseModel):
25:     compiled: str
26:     file: str
27:     uri: Optional[str] = None
28:     query: Optional[str] = None
29: 
30:     @model_validator(mode="after")
31:     def set_uri_fallback(self):
32:         """Set the URI to existing deeplink URI. Fallback to file based URI if unset."""
33:         if self.uri and self.uri.strip():
34:             self.uri = self.uri
35:         elif self.file and (self.file.startswith("http") or self.file.startswith("file://")):
36:             self.uri = self.file
37:         elif self.file:
38:             self.uri = f"file://{self.file}"
39:         else:
40:             self.uri = None
41:         return self

162:         max_length=200,
163:         null=True,
164:         blank=True,
165:         default=None,
166:         help_text="LDAP Distinguished Name for users authenticated via LDAP"
167:     )
168: 
169:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
170:         if not self.uuid:
171:             self.uuid = uuid.uuid4()
172:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)

178: class LdapConfig(DbBaseModel):
179:     """LDAP server configuration for external authentication.
180: 
181:     SECURITY NOTE: This model stores ONLY non-sensitive configuration.
182:     Credentials (bind_password) are NEVER stored here.
183:     Use secrets.py or secrets_vault.py for credential retrieval.
184:     """
185: 
186:     server_url = models.CharField(
187:         max_length=200,
188:         help_text="LDAP server URL (e.g., ldaps://ldap.example.com:636)"
189:     )
190:     user_search_base = models.CharField(
191:         max_length=200,
192:         help_text="Base DN for user searches (e.g., OU=Users,DC=example,DC=com)"
193:     )
194:     user_search_filter = models.CharField(
195:         max_length=200,
196:         default="(sAMAccountName={username})",
197:         help_text="LDAP filter template for finding users"
198:     )
199:     use_tls = models.BooleanField(
200:         default=True,
201:         help_text="Use TLS/SSL for LDAP connections"
202:     )
203:     tls_verify = models.BooleanField(
204:         default=True,
205:         help_text="Verify TLS certificates"
206:     )
207:     tls_ca_bundle_path = models.CharField(
208:         max_length=500,
209:         null=True,
210:         blank=True,
211:         default=None,
212:         help_text="Path to custom CA bundle for TLS verification (optional)"
213:     )
214:     enabled = models.BooleanField(
215:         default=False,
216:         help_text="Enable LDAP authentication"
217:     )
218: 
219:     class Meta:
220:         verbose_name = "LDAP Configuration"
221:         verbose_name_plural = "LDAP Configurations"
222: 
223:     def __str__(self):
224:         return f"LDAP: {self.server_url}"

354:     class PrivacyLevel(models.TextChoices):

358: 
359:     class InputToolOptions(models.TextChoices):

367:     class OutputModeOptions(models.TextChoices):

379:     )

381:         models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=OutputModeOptions.choices), default=list, null=True, blank=True
382:     )
383:     managed_by_admin = models.BooleanField(default=False)
384:     chat_model = models.ForeignKey(ChatModel, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
385:     slug = models.CharField(max_length=200, unique=True)
386:     style_color = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=StyleColorTypes.choices, default=StyleColorTypes.ORANGE)
387:     style_icon = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=StyleIconTypes.choices, default=StyleIconTypes.LIGHTBULB)
388:     privacy_level = models.CharField(max_length=30, choices=PrivacyLevel.choices, default=PrivacyLevel.PRIVATE)
389:     is_hidden = models.BooleanField(default=False)
390: 
391:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
392:         is_new = self._state.adding
393: 
394:         if self.creator is None:
395:             self.managed_by_admin = True
396: 
397:         if is_new and not self.slug:
398:             random_sequence = "".join(choice("0123456789") for i in range(6))
399:             slug = f"{self.name.lower().replace(' ', '-')}-{random_sequence}"
400:             self.slug = slug
401: 
402:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
403: 
404:     def __str__(self):
405:         return self.name

408: class ProcessLock(DbBaseModel):
409:     class Operation(models.TextChoices):
410:         INDEX_CONTENT = "index_content"
411:         SCHEDULED_JOB = "scheduled_job"
412:         SCHEDULE_LEADER = "schedule_leader"
413:         APPLY_MIGRATIONS = "apply_migrations"
414: 
415:     # We need to make sure that some operations are thread-safe. To do so, add locks for potentially shared operations.
416:     # For example, we need to make sure that only one process is updating the embeddings at a time.
417:     name = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=Operation.choices, unique=True)
418:     started_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
419:     max_duration_in_seconds = models.IntegerField(default=60 * 60 * 12)  # 12 hours
420: 
421: 
422: @receiver(pre_save, sender=Agent)
423: def verify_agent(sender, instance, **kwargs):
424:     # check if this is a new instance
425:     if instance._state.adding:
426:         if Agent.objects.filter(name=instance.name, privacy_level=Agent.PrivacyLevel.PUBLIC).exists():
427:             raise ValidationError(f"A public Agent with the name {instance.name} already exists.")
428:         if Agent.objects.filter(name=instance.name, creator=instance.creator).exists():
429:             raise ValidationError(f"A private Agent with the name {instance.name} already exists.")

449: class WebScraper(DbBaseModel):
450:     class WebScraperType(models.TextChoices):
451:         FIRECRAWL = "Firecrawl"
452:         OLOSTEP = "Olostep"
453:         EXA = "Exa"
454:         DIRECT = "Direct"
455: 
456:     name = models.CharField(
457:         max_length=200,
458:         default=None,
459:         null=True,
460:         blank=True,
461:         unique=True,
462:         help_text="Friendly name. If not set, it will be set to the type of the scraper.",
463:     )
464:     type = models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=WebScraperType.choices, default=WebScraperType.DIRECT)
465:     api_key = models.CharField(
466:         max_length=200,
467:         default=None,
468:         null=True,
469:         blank=True,
470:         help_text="API key of the web scraper. Only set if scraper service requires an API key. Default is set from env var.",
471:     )
472:     api_url = models.URLField(
473:         max_length=200,
474:         default=None,
475:         null=True,
476:         blank=True,
477:         help_text="API URL of the web scraper. Only set if scraper service on non-default URL.",
478:     )
479:     priority = models.IntegerField(
480:         default=None,
481:         null=True,
482:         blank=True,
483:         unique=True,
484:         help_text="Priority of the web scraper. Lower numbers run first.",
485:     )
486: 
487:     def clean(self):
488:         error = {}
489:         if self.name is None:
490:             self.name = self.type.capitalize()
491:         if self.api_url is None:
492:             if self.type == self.WebScraperType.FIRECRAWL:
493:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("FIRECRAWL_API_URL", "https://api.firecrawl.dev")
494:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.OLOSTEP:
495:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("OLOSTEP_API_URL", "https://agent.olostep.com/olostep-p2p-incomingAPI")
496:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.EXA:
497:                 self.api_url = os.getenv("EXA_API_URL", "https://api.exa.ai")
498:         if self.api_key is None:
499:             if self.type == self.WebScraperType.FIRECRAWL:
500:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("FIRECRAWL_API_KEY")
501:                 if not self.api_key and self.api_url == "https://api.firecrawl.dev":
502:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use default Firecrawl. Get API key from https://firecrawl.dev."
503:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.OLOSTEP:
504:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("OLOSTEP_API_KEY")
505:                 if self.api_key is None:
506:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use Olostep. Get API key from https://olostep.com/."
507:             elif self.type == self.WebScraperType.EXA:
508:                 self.api_key = os.getenv("EXA_API_KEY")
509:                 if self.api_key is None:
510:                     error["api_key"] = "Set API key to use Exa. Get API key from https://exa.ai/."
511:         if error:
512:             raise ValidationError(error)
513: 
514:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
515:         self.clean()
516: 
517:         if self.priority is None:
518:             max_priority = WebScraper.objects.aggregate(models.Max("priority"))["priority__max"]
519:             self.priority = max_priority + 1 if max_priority else 1
520: 
521:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
522: 
523:     def __str__(self):
524:         return self.name
525:

564:         WebScraper, on_delete=models.CASCADE, default=None, null=True, blank=True, related_name="web_scraper"
565:     )
566:     priority = models.IntegerField(
567:         default=None,
568:         null=True,
569:         blank=True,
570:         unique=True,
571:         help_text="Priority of the server chat settings. Lower numbers run first.",
572:     )
573:     memory_mode = models.CharField(
574:         max_length=20,
575:         choices=MemoryMode.choices,
576:         default=MemoryMode.ENABLED_DEFAULT_ON,
577:         help_text="Server-level memory feature configuration. Disabled overrides user preference.",
578:     )

580:     def clean(self):
581:         error = {}
582:         if self.chat_default and self.chat_default.price_tier != PriceTier.FREE:
583:             error["chat_default"] = "Set the price tier of this chat model to free or use a free tier chat model."
584:         if self.think_free_fast and self.think_free_fast.price_tier != PriceTier.FREE:
585:             error["think_free_fast"] = "Set the price tier of this chat model to free or use a free tier chat model."
586:         if self.think_free_deep and self.think_free_deep.price_tier != PriceTier.FREE:
587:             error["think_free_deep"] = "Set the price tier of this chat model to free or use a free tier chat model."
588:         if error:
589:             raise ValidationError(error)

591:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
592:         self.clean()
593: 
594:         if self.priority is None:
595:             max_priority = ServerChatSettings.objects.aggregate(models.Max("priority"))["priority__max"]
596:             self.priority = max_priority + 1 if max_priority else 1
597: 
598:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)

606:         HUGGINGFACE = "huggingface"

610:     # This is the model name exposed to users on their settings page
611:     name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="default")
612:     # Type of content the model can generate embeddings for
613:     model_type = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=ModelType.choices, default=ModelType.TEXT)
614:     # Bi-encoder model of sentence-transformer type to load from HuggingFace
615:     bi_encoder = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="thenlper/gte-small")
616:     # Config passed to the sentence-transformer model constructor. E.g. device="cuda:0", trust_remote_server=True etc.
617:     bi_encoder_model_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
618:     # Query encode configs like prompt, precision, normalize_embeddings, etc. for sentence-transformer models
619:     bi_encoder_query_encode_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
620:     # Docs encode configs like prompt, precision, normalize_embeddings, etc. for sentence-transformer models
621:     bi_encoder_docs_encode_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
622:     # Cross-encoder model of sentence-transformer type to load from HuggingFace
623:     cross_encoder = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="mixedbread-ai/mxbai-rerank-xsmall-v1")
624:     # Config passed to the cross-encoder model constructor. E.g. device="cuda:0", trust_remote_server=True etc.
625:     cross_encoder_model_config = models.JSONField(default=dict, blank=True)
626:     # Inference server API endpoint to use for embeddings inference. Bi-encoder model should be hosted on this server
627:     embeddings_inference_endpoint = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
628:     # Inference server API Key to use for embeddings inference. Bi-encoder model should be hosted on this server
629:     embeddings_inference_endpoint_api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
630:     # Inference server API type to use for embeddings inference.
631:     embeddings_inference_endpoint_type = models.CharField(
632:         max_length=200, choices=ApiType.choices, default=ApiType.LOCAL
633:     )
634:     # Inference server API endpoint to use for embeddings inference. Cross-encoder model should be hosted on this server
635:     cross_encoder_inference_endpoint = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
636:     # Inference server API Key to use for embeddings inference. Cross-encoder model should be hosted on this server
637:     cross_encoder_inference_endpoint_api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
638:     # The confidence threshold of the bi_encoder model to consider the embeddings as relevant
639:     bi_encoder_confidence_threshold = models.FloatField(default=0.18)
640:     # Alpha weight for hybrid search (sparse-dense), 0 = keyword only, 1 = dense only
641:     hybrid_alpha = models.FloatField(default=0.6)
642:     # Whether to enable hybrid search combining keyword and dense retrieval
643:     hybrid_enabled = models.BooleanField(default=True)

650:     class ModelType(models.TextChoices):

652:         REPLICATE = "replicate"
653:         GOOGLE = "google"
654: 
655:     model_name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default="dall-e-3")
656:     friendly_name = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
657:     model_type = models.CharField(max_length=200, choices=ModelType.choices, default=ModelType.OPENAI)
658:     price_tier = models.CharField(max_length=20, choices=PriceTier.choices, default=PriceTier.FREE)
659:     api_key = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
660:     ai_model_api = models.ForeignKey(AiModelApi, on_delete=models.CASCADE, default=None, null=True, blank=True)

662:     def clean(self):
663:         # Custom validation logic
664:         error = {}
665:         if self.model_type == self.ModelType.OPENAI:
666:             if self.api_key and self.ai_model_api:
667:                 error["api_key"] = (
668:                     "Both API key and AI Model API cannot be set for OpenAI models. Please set only one of them."
669:                 )
670:                 error["ai_model_api"] = (
671:                     "Both API key and OpenAI config cannot be set for OpenAI models. Please set only one of them."
672:                 )
673:         if self.model_type != self.ModelType.OPENAI and self.model_type != self.ModelType.GOOGLE:
674:             if not self.api_key:
675:                 error["api_key"] = "The API key field must be set for non OpenAI, non Google models."
676:             if self.ai_model_api:
677:                 error["ai_model_api"] = "AI Model API cannot be set for non OpenAI, non Google models."
678:         if error:
679:             raise ValidationError(error)
680: 
681:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
682:         self.clean()
683:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
684: 
685:     def __str__(self):
686:         return f"{self.model_name} - {self.model_type}"

719: class Conversation(DbBaseModel):
720:     user = models.ForeignKey(KhojUser, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
721:     conversation_log = models.JSONField(default=dict)
722:     client = models.ForeignKey(ClientApplication, on_delete=models.CASCADE, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
723: 
724:     # Slug is an app-generated conversation identifier. Need not be unique. Used as display title essentially.
725:     slug = models.CharField(max_length=200, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
726: 
727:     # The title field is explicitly set by the user.
728:     title = models.CharField(max_length=500, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
729:     agent = models.ForeignKey(Agent, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, default=None, null=True, blank=True)
730:     file_filters = models.JSONField(default=list)
731:     id = models.UUIDField(default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False, unique=True, primary_key=True, db_index=True)
732: 
733:     def clean(self):
734:         # Validate conversation_log structure
735:         try:
736:             messages = self.conversation_log.get("chat", [])
737:             for msg in messages:
738:                 ChatMessageModel.model_validate(msg)
739:         except Exception as e:
740:             raise ValidationError(f"Invalid conversation_log format: {str(e)}")
741: 
742:     def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
743:         self.clean()
744:         super().save(*args, **kwargs)
745: 
746:     @property
747:     def messages(self) -> List[ChatMessageModel]:
748:         """Type-hinted accessor for conversation messages"""
749:         validated_messages = []
750:         for msg in self.conversation_log.get("chat", []):
751:             try:
752:                 # Clean up inferred queries if they contain None
753:                 if msg.get("intent") and msg["intent"].get("inferred_queries"):
754:                     msg["intent"]["inferred-queries"] = [
755:                         q for q in msg["intent"]["inferred_queries"] if q is not None and isinstance(q, str)
756:                     ]
757:                 msg["message"] = str(msg.get("message", ""))
758:                 validated_messages.append(ChatMessageModel.model_validate(msg))
759:             except ValidationError as e:
760:                 logger.warning(f"Skipping invalid message in conversation: {e}")
761:                 continue
762:         return validated_messages
763: 
764:     async def pop_message(self, interrupted: bool = False) -> Optional[ChatMessageModel]:
765:         """
766:         Remove and return the last message from the conversation log, persisting the change to the database.
767:         When interrupted is True, we only drop the last message if it was an interrupted message by khoj.
768:         """
769:         chat_log = self.conversation_log.get("chat", [])
770: 
771:         if not chat_log:
772:             return None
773: 
774:         last_message = chat_log[-1]
775:         is_interrupted_msg = last_message.get("by") == "khoj" and not last_message.get("message")
776:         # When handling an interruption, only pop if the last message is an empty one by khoj.
777:         if interrupted and not is_interrupted_msg:
778:             return None
779: 
780:         # Pop the last message, save the conversation, and then return the message.
781:         popped_message_dict = chat_log.pop()
782:         await self.asave()
783: 
784:         # Try to validate and return the popped message as a Pydantic model
785:         try:
786:             return ChatMessageModel.model_validate(popped_message_dict)
787:         except ValidationError as e:
788:             logger.warning(f"Popped an invalid message from conversation. The removal has been saved. Error: {e}")
789:             # The invalid message was removed and saved, but we can't return a valid model.
790:             return None
791:

801: @receiver(pre_save, sender=PublicConversation)
802: def verify_public_conversation(sender, instance, **kwargs):
803:     # check if this is a new instance
804:     if instance._state.adding:
805:         base_length = 50  # Base slug length before adding random suffix
806:         base_slug = re.sub(r"\W+", "-", instance.slug.lower())[:base_length] if instance.slug else uuid.uuid4().hex
807:         suffix_length = 8  # Length of the random suffix to ensure uniqueness
808:         while True:
809:             random_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:suffix_length]
810:             slug = f"{base_slug}-{random_id}"
811:             if not PublicConversation.objects.filter(slug=slug).exists():
812:                 break
813:         instance.slug = slug
